room.caption: [G2-TownB] It's like a tree house!
room.creationCode:
locationCheck(10) global.zEncZone=3
if global.gameProgress=650 global.gameProgress=660
gameScene=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4MainA) //sideChat=instance_create(0,0,oEvCh4SideA)
var tempMplay; tempMplay=findMusic(206) playMusic(tempMplay,0,0)

instance.creationCode: talker="Insightful Old Woman" stringToShow="If you're somewhat close to a Fuse Bomb's explosion, your feet will smoke, which means your next jump will be boosted!" boxSize=2 AI_Action=2 runAcc=-0.5 image_speed=0.1

talker="Jogging Man" stringToShow="Cross Forest holds a secret." boxSize=1
AI_Action=1 runAcc=-4.5 image_speed=0.42 sprite_index=sNPC_ZCreep

talker="Roof Woman" stringToShow="Corner of Maze Ocean is secret." boxSize=1
AI_Action=2 runAcc=-0.75 image_speed=0.15 sprite_index=sNPC_ZWoman

shopType=oShopWindow shopText="Got some unique items here for you. It'll let you use your bombs a bit faster, or get the bow to alter your arrows." maxInv=3 inv[0]=15 inv[1]=20 inv[2]=36 inv[3]=0 inv[4]=0 sprite_index=sNPC_ZCreep image_speed=0
